title: Dune
writer: JON SPAIHTS and DENIS VILLENEUVE and ERIC ROTH
logline: A young nobleman must embrace his destiny as a prophesied leader when his family is betrayed and he's forced to survive among the desert warriors of a hostile planet that holds the key to the universe's most valuable resource.
antagonistOrConflict: Baron Harkonnen and the imperial conspiracy against House Atreides

actBreaks.description: The Atreides family arrives on Arrakis, completing the setup and launching them into the dangerous new world.

validation.ruling: Scene #30 shows the Atreides family arriving on Arrakis, stepping into the blazing heat and alien world that represents their irreversible commitment to their fate, fundamentally changing the story from preparation and departure to active engagement with the deadly politics of Arrakis.

actBreaks.description: Paul and Jessica escape into the desert after the fall of House Atreides, beginning their transformation and survival among the Fremen.

validation.ruling: Scene #89 shows Paul and Jessica discovering Leto's signet ring in the fremkit, confirming his death and marking their complete transformation from nobility to desert refugees, representing the irreversible shift from their old identities to their new existence among the Fremen.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This is a classical three-act hero's journey structure, but with the sophisticated pacing of a literary adaptation. Act I establishes Paul's world on Caladan and his emerging powers, building dread through prophetic dreams and political machinations. The transition to Arrakis marks a clear threshold crossing. Act II is dominated by the Harkonnen betrayal and the systematic destruction of House Atreides, culminating in Paul and Jessica's escape into the deep desert. Act III focuses on Paul's integration with the Fremen and his first steps toward becoming their prophesied leader. The structure serves the epic scope while maintaining intimate character focus.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The script employs deliberate, almost ceremonial pacing in early scenes (the Gom Jabbar test, cemetery conversation) that accelerates dramatically during the betrayal sequence around scene 69. The middle act moves with relentless momentum through the attack and escape, then slows again for the mystical desert sequences. Scene transitions often use match cuts and visual bridges to maintain flow across the vast scope.

incitingIncident.description: The Reverend Mother tells Jessica that Paul passed the test but warns that he has far to go, revealing their centuries-long breeding program and that they have other prospects if Paul fails.
incitingIncident.sceneHeading: 11 EXT. CASTLE CALADAN - TERRACE LANDING PAD - NIGHT 11 11

validation.ruling: Scene #7 shows Paul's prophetic dreams but doesn't shatter his ordinary world or force immediate action. Scene #24 is the true inciting incident where Duke Leto formally accepts the Emperor's assignment to take control of Arrakis, making an irreversible commitment that shatters the Atreides' peaceful existence on Caladan and forces them into the dangerous political trap that drives the entire story.

midpoint.description: A lieutenant bursts into the barracks and shakes Gurney awake from sleep.

validation.ruling: Scene #69 shows Gurney being awakened, which is reactive setup. Scene #68 is the true midpoint where Leto is drugged and captured by the betrayal, representing the point of no return that shifts the story from the Atreides trying to establish themselves on Arrakis to Paul and Jessica's survival and transformation, fundamentally changing the story's direction.

climax.description: Paul prepares for ritual combat with Jamis, experiencing a vision of being stabbed, while Chani gives him her crysknife and wishes him an honorable death.

validation.ruling: Scene #125 is the denouement showing Paul's integration with the Fremen after his transformation is complete. Scene #124 is the true climax where Paul fights Jamis in ritual combat, representing the peak confrontation where he must prove himself to survive, demonstrating his character arc completion as he applies his training and accepts his destiny among the Fremen.

scenes.heading: 1 DREAM SEQUENCE: EXT. ARRAKIS - END OF DAY 1 1
scenes.summary: A dream sequence reveals the desert planet Arrakis with massive spice harvesters and Harkonnen soldiers carrying their emblem through an industrial nightmare.

scenes.heading: INT. CALADAN CASTLE, PAUL’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 2A
scenes.summary: Paul Atreides wakes startled from his prophetic dream in his bedroom on Caladan.

scenes.heading: INT. CALADAN CASTLE - ROOM OVERLOOKING VALLEY - MORNING 2C
scenes.summary: Lady Jessica and Paul discuss the upcoming ceremonial arrival of the Emperor's Herald while she demonstrates the mysterious properties of water by not handing him a glass.

scenes.heading: EXT. CALADAN TARMAC - DAY 2D
scenes.summary: The Imperial Herald arrives with ceremony to formally grant House Atreides control of Arrakis, while Duke Leto whispers to Gurney to smile during the proceedings.

scenes.heading: EXT. CALADAN - DAY 2B
scenes.summary: A fighter spacecraft performs dangerous low-altitude maneuvers through the mountains of Caladan.

scenes.heading: INT. CALADAN MILITARY HANGAR - MORNING 1A
scenes.summary: Duncan Idaho lands his fighter and discusses equipment preparations with his commandos before greeting Paul in the military hangar.

scenes.heading: EXT. SPACEPORT TARMAC, DAY 1D
scenes.summary: Paul reveals to Duncan that he dreamed of Harkonnen forces leaving Arrakis a month before it was announced, and that he saw Duncan lying dead in battle.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul's prophetic abilities are revealed, establishing his supernatural sight and the supernatural elements of the story.

scenes.heading: INT. KYNES’S LABORATORY CORRIDOR (ARRAKIS) 1G
scenes.summary: Paul describes seeing Duncan dead and clean-shaven in his vision, but Duncan dismisses the prophecy since he refuses to shave his beard.

scenes.heading: 22 EXT. CALADAN’S CLIFFTOPS - DUCAL CEMETERY - DAY 22 22
scenes.summary: Duke Leto visits his father's grave and refuses Paul's request to join Duncan's advance mission to Arrakis, insisting Paul will travel safely with the family.

scenes.heading: INT. CALADAN BARRACKS - OFFICERS’ MESS - NIGHT 3A
scenes.summary: Duncan's farewell party is in full swing with Atreides officers celebrating, while Gurney sits alone looking troubled.

scenes.heading: EXT. CALADAN TARMAC - DAWN 23A
scenes.summary: Duncan boards his stealth ship clean-shaven and exchanges a final goodbye gesture with Paul watching from a castle window, fulfilling part of Paul's vision.

scenes.heading: INT. PAUL’S BEDROOM - SAME TIME 22aaB
scenes.summary: Soldiers and servants help Paul pack his belongings as he prepares to leave Caladan.

scenes.heading: INT. PAUL’S STUDY- DAY 22aaA
scenes.summary: Paul studies Fremen culture through books and holographic documentaries, practicing the sandwalk technique used to avoid sandworm attacks.

scenes.heading: 14 INT. TRAINING ROOM - DAY 14 14
scenes.summary: Gurney trains Paul in sword combat, emphasizing the need for constant vigilance and the reality that their enemies want to kill him.

scenes.heading: 19 SPACE - GIEDI PRIME 19 19
scenes.summary: The gray industrial world of Giedi Prime orbits a cold blue sun.

scenes.heading: EXT. CITYSCAPE OF GEIDI PRIME’S CAPITAL 20A
scenes.summary: A synthetic megalopolis with plastic rivers dominates Giedi Prime's capital as a ship lands.

scenes.heading: INT. HARKONNEN PALACE - CORRIDOR - DAY 21A
scenes.summary: Beast Rabban enters the Harkonnen palace baths where Baron Harkonnen and Piter de Vries await in a steam-filled room, discussing their plans.

scenes.heading: 5 EXT. SPACE - CALADAN ORBIT 5 5
scenes.summary: A massive Heighliner positions over Caladan as a small shuttle emerges and descends toward the planet.

scenes.heading: 6 INT. CASTLE CALADAN - MEDITATION ROOM - NIGHT 6 6
scenes.summary: Jessica meditates in perfect stillness, achieving a state where her breathing stops and time seems frozen before thunder breaks the silence.

scenes.heading: 7 EXT. CASTLE CALADAN - NIGHT 7 7
scenes.summary: The Reverend Mother and six Bene Gesserit sisters arrive at Castle Caladan via shuttle.

scenes.heading: 9 INT. PAUL’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 9 9
scenes.summary: Paul dreams of Chani's impossibly blue eyes before Jessica wakes him in the moonlit bedroom.

scenes.heading: INT. CASTLE CORRIDOR - NIGHT 9A
scenes.summary: Jessica leads Paul through castle corridors where Doctor Yueh waits, explaining that the Reverend Mother wants to meet Paul and knows about his dreams.

scenes.heading: 10 INT. LIBRARY - NIGHT 10 10
scenes.summary: The Reverend Mother tests Paul with a deadly pain box while holding a poisoned needle to his neck, using the Voice to compel his obedience as he endures agony to prove his humanity.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul undergoes the gom jabbar test, a life-or-death trial that confirms his potential as the Kwisatz Haderach and establishes the Bene Gesserit's role in his destiny.

scenes.heading: 11 EXT. CASTLE CALADAN - TERRACE LANDING PAD - NIGHT 11 11
scenes.summary: The Reverend Mother tells Jessica that Paul passed the test but warns that he has far to go, revealing their centuries-long breeding program and that they have other prospects if Paul fails.

scenes.heading: EXT. CALADAN CASTLE - MORNING 11A
scenes.summary: The Atreides family flag is removed from Caladan Castle in the morning light.

scenes.heading: INT. GREAT HALL - DAY 22aA
scenes.summary: The Atreides family oversees the packing of their possessions, including the mounted bull's head, as beloved servants tearfully bid them farewell.

scenes.heading: EXT. CALADAN’S SHORE - SUNSET 22A
scenes.summary: Paul stands on Caladan's shore watching Atreides ships depart, touching the water one last time as the sun sets on his homeworld.

scenes.heading: 24 EXT. ARRAKIS - DEEP DESERT - DAWN 24 24
scenes.summary: Stilgar crosses the desert using the sandwalk technique to meet three waiting Fremen silhouettes at a massive rock formation.

scenes.heading: 25 EXT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - DAY 25 25
scenes.summary: The Atreides flagship lands at the sprawling Arrakeen spaceport as thousands of natives watch from behind barricades.

scenes.heading: 26 INT. ATREIDES FLAGSHIP - BOARDING RAMP 26 26
scenes.summary: The Atreides family and guards activate their shields and prepare to disembark into the blast-furnace heat of Arrakis.

scenes.heading: 27 EXT. LANDING FIELD 27 27
scenes.summary: Thufir Hawat welcomes the arriving Atreides family as bagpipes play and the legions form up on the dusty landing field.

scenes.heading: 28 ORNITHOPTER PAD 28 28
scenes.summary: Hawat warns Paul and Jessica not to trust the crowd's welcome as natives shout 'Lisan al-Gaib' with religious fervor, calling Paul the prophesied messiah.

scenes.heading: EXT. LANDING FIELD, BESIDE ATREIDES ARMY FRIGATES 28B
scenes.summary: Duke Leto reviews his troops who respond with devoted enthusiasm as Gurney calls out the Atreides battle cry.

scenes.heading: 29 INT. ORNITHOPTER - CONTINUOUS 29 29
scenes.summary: Jessica explains to Paul that 'Lisan al-Gaib' means messiah and that the Bene Gesserit have planted these religious beliefs to prepare the way for their purposes.

scenes.heading: 33 INT. RESIDENCY - GREAT HALL - DAY 33 33
scenes.summary: Hawat, Paul, and Jessica enter the massive Great Hall of the Residency with their guards.

scenes.heading: 38 EXT. RESIDENCY BALCONY - DAY 38 38
scenes.summary: Duke Leto and Gurney survey the quiet city of Arrakeen from a balcony, discussing their vulnerable positions at the spaceport and refinery.

scenes.heading: 35 INT. RESIDENCY - PAUL’S NEW ROOM - DAY 35 35
scenes.summary: Paul stands in his new room gazing out at the alien skyline of Arrakeen with spice particles dancing in the wind.

scenes.heading: 34 INT. NORTH WING - CORRIDOR 34 34
scenes.summary: Paul walks down a corridor decorated with a fresco of a sandworm among rolling dunes.

scenes.heading: 37 INT. DINING HALL - DAY 37 37
scenes.summary: Jessica interviews potential housekeepers who prostrate themselves before her, selecting the wise and observant Shadout Mapes who recognizes Jessica as Bene Gesserit and speaks of prophecy.

scenes.heading: EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY COURTYARD - SAME MOMENT 37A
scenes.summary: Paul encounters pilgrims praying to the palm trees and calling him Lisan al-Gaib while a gardener warns him about the dangerous midday heat.

scenes.heading: INT. LETO’S OFFICE - DAY 38aA
scenes.summary: Duke Leto opens a chest containing severed human fingers and reads a threatening note from Baron Harkonnen promising a slow death.

scenes.heading: EXT. GEIDI PRIME - ESTABLISHING 42AC
scenes.summary: The Harkonnen military fleet waits above Giedi Prime as a Bene Gesserit ship approaches.

scenes.heading: INT. HARKONNEN THRONE ROOM - NIGHT 42AD
scenes.summary: The Reverend Mother meets with Baron Harkonnen and Piter, using the Voice to dismiss a grotesque pet and delivering the Emperor's promise to strengthen the Baron's hand.
scenes.turningPointNote: The imperial conspiracy against House Atreides is revealed as the Emperor secretly backs the Harkonnens, escalating the central conflict.

scenes.heading: EXT. ARRAKEEN - NIGHT 47BB
scenes.summary: Paul dreams of following Chani through desert rocks and sharing an intimate moment discovering desert mice.

scenes.heading: INT. RESIDENCY, PAUL’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 47BA
scenes.summary: Paul dreams of Gurney in Fremen clothes, aged and dirty, smoking spice and explaining how everyone on Arrakis becomes addicted to it.

scenes.heading: 44 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - WAR ROOM - MORNING 44 44
scenes.summary: Paul joins his first strategy meeting where Gurney teases him for being late and Duke Leto enters bearing the visible weight of leadership.

scenes.heading: 45 EXT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - TARMAC - DAY 45 45
scenes.summary: Hawat shows the leadership team the massive spice quotas they must meet while explaining how Harkonnen sabotage slows production, leading Leto to demand a field inspection with the Judge of the Change.

scenes.heading: 46 INT. RESIDENCY - LETO’S OFFICE - DAY 46 46
scenes.summary: Duncan reports discovering millions of hidden Fremen living in underground sietches, describing them as the finest fighters in the Imperium before being interrupted by urgent news.
scenes.turningPointNote: The discovery of millions of hidden Fremen warriors dramatically shifts the strategic landscape and reveals a massive potential ally.

scenes.heading: 47 EXT. ARRAKEEN BARRACKS - DUSK 47 47
scenes.summary: Paul, Gurney, and Duncan reunite in the barracks where Duncan gives Paul a Fremen paracompass and demonstrates their ingenious technology including sand compactors.

scenes.heading: EXT. SPACEPORT - MORNING 48A
scenes.summary: Old Harkonnen harvesters undergo repairs at the spaceport while a small convoy of carryalls transports working harvesters toward the desert.

scenes.heading: 48 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - AIRCRAFT BAY - MORNING 48 48
scenes.summary: Duke Leto, Paul, and Gurney meet Dr. Liet Kynes at the aircraft bay, where she checks their stillsuits and explains their function before they depart for the desert.

scenes.heading: 52 EXT. SPICE CRAWLER - CONTINUOUS 52 52
scenes.summary: Paul touches spice-saturated sand and hears Chani's voice while Leto urgently orders evacuation of the spice crawler crew as a sandworm approaches.

scenes.heading: 53 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - AIRCRAFT BAY - DAY 53 53
scenes.summary: Leto scolds Paul for taking risks, then tells Kynes that House Atreides has been set up to fail and asks her to report this to the Emperor.

scenes.heading: EXT. SALUSA SECUNDUS - MILITARY SPACEPORT - DAY 55A
scenes.summary: Thousands of Sardaukar warriors kneel on the military base of Salusa Secundus under Imperial flags.

scenes.heading: 55 INT. PAUL’S ROOM - SUNSET 55 55
scenes.summary: Dr. Yueh examines Paul and diagnoses spice sensitivity, but Paul insists he had visions, not an allergic reaction.

scenes.heading: EXT. ARRAKIS - DESERT - MORNING 55AAB
scenes.summary: In a vision, Chani appears to Paul with a halo of sunlight, then darkens and stabs him with a crysknife.

scenes.heading: INT. FREMEN HOUSE, ARRAKIS - DAY 55AAA
scenes.summary: Paul sees a vision of Jessica holding a Fremen baby, then reveals to his shocked mother that he knows she is pregnant.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul's prescient abilities fully manifest as he reveals knowledge he shouldn't possess

scenes.heading: INT. RESIDENCY CORRIDOR 55aB
scenes.summary: Jessica walks through the corridor in tears as Bene Gesserit voices proclaim Paul is the Kwisatz Haderach.

scenes.heading: INT. MAIN HALL - SUNSET 55aA
scenes.summary: Shadout Mapes finds Paul staring at a worm fresco and tells him his visions are a gift from Shai-Hulud.

scenes.heading: 58 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - BALCONY - DAY 58 58
scenes.summary: Leto joins Paul on the balcony and discusses the legend of Lisan al-Gaib, suggesting Paul fears it might be true.

scenes.heading: 61 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - PAUL'S ROOM - NIGHT 61 61
scenes.summary: Paul wearily undresses in his room as Dr. Yueh appears and places a white tablet on the nightstand.

scenes.heading: INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - WAR ROOM - END OF DAY 58A
scenes.summary: Duke Leto uses combat sign language to send Duncan Idaho on a secret mission to the Fremen at dawn.

scenes.heading: 60 INT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - BARRACKS - NIGHT 60 60
scenes.summary: Gurney plays his baliset and sings a mournful song about salt smoke and seagulls to the listening troops.

scenes.heading: 64 INT. MASTER BEDROOM - NIGHT 64 64
scenes.summary: Jessica uses Bene Gesserit techniques to help the anxious Leto fall asleep by placing her fingers on his temples and humming.

scenes.heading: 65 EXT. RESIDENCY - NIGHT 65 65
scenes.summary: The lights in the Residency windows go out one by one as Gurney's song continues.

scenes.heading: 67 INT. MASTER BEDROOM - HOURS LATER 67 67
scenes.summary: Leto awakens anxiously and spots a flickering signal light on the distant Shield Wall cliffs.

scenes.heading: 68 INT. MAIN CORRIDOR - NIGHT 68 68
scenes.summary: Leto investigates the signal lights and discovers his security communications are down, then hears strange animal sounds inside the house.

scenes.heading: 69 INT CORRIDOR ADJACENT TO SHIELD GENERATOR - NIGHT 69 69
scenes.summary: A dart pistol fires a specialized dart that penetrates Leto's shield at low speed, drugging and incapacitating him.
scenes.turningPointNote: The betrayal begins as Duke Leto is captured, triggering the fall of House Atreides

scenes.heading: 71 INT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - BARRACKS - NIGHT 71 71
scenes.summary: A lieutenant bursts into the barracks and shakes Gurney awake from sleep.

scenes.heading: 72 EXT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - NIGHT 72 72
scenes.summary: Gurney and his men see a massive Harkonnen war fleet descending from orbit as the spaceport control tower explodes.

scenes.heading: 73 EXT. ARRAKIS ORBIT 73 73
scenes.summary: The night side of Arrakis is illuminated by the spaceport explosion as a Harkonnen frigate's shadow passes overhead.

scenes.heading: 74 EXT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - NIGHT 74 74
scenes.summary: Gurney leads his outnumbered men in a fierce battle against Harkonnen soldiers, wielding two swords and charging with a wolfish smile.

scenes.heading: EXT. ARRAKEEN - NIGHT 74A
scenes.summary: Harkonnen troopships land around the Residency in coordinated assault formations.

scenes.heading: 75 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - NIGHT 75 75
scenes.summary: Atreides guards fight desperately until Sardaukar drop from the sky and break through their defenses into the Residency.

scenes.heading: 76 SERVICE CORRIDOR 76 76
scenes.summary: Dr. Yueh reveals to the paralyzed Leto that he has betrayed House Atreides to save his wife Wanna from Harkonnen torture.
scenes.turningPointNote: The devastating betrayal is revealed as Yueh explains his impossible choice between loyalty and love

scenes.heading: 66 INT. RESIDENCY - PAUL’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 66 66
scenes.summary: Paul stirs in his sleep as a Harkonnen soldier opens his door, while Chani appears in his vision telling him to wake up.

scenes.heading: 80 EXT. RESIDENCY - NIGHT 80 80
scenes.summary: Hundreds of soldiers flood the burning Residency while Sardaukar systematically behead captured Atreides soldiers in the courtyard.

scenes.heading: 78 INT. RESIDENCY CORRIDOR - NIGHT 78 78
scenes.summary: Duncan Idaho fights through multiple Sardaukar in the corridor, destroying slow-darts and killing his attackers with precise swordwork.

scenes.heading: INT. RESIDENCY, MASTER BEDROOM - NIGHT 78A
scenes.summary: Duncan runs into the Duke and Jessica's bedroom and finds it empty.

scenes.heading: INT. RESIDENCY, PAUL’S BEDROOM -NIGHT 78B
scenes.summary: Duncan enters Paul's bedroom and discovers Paul is no longer there.

scenes.heading: 86 INT. ORNITHOPTER (GROUNDED / IN FLIGHT) - NIGHT 86 86
scenes.summary: Harkonnen troopers load Jessica and Paul into an ornithopter, planning to drop them in the desert for the worms to kill.

scenes.heading: 87 EXT. SHIELD WALL - NIGHT 87 87
scenes.summary: The ornithopter carrying Paul and Jessica passes over the Shield Wall into the desert as Arrakeen Landing burns in the distance.

scenes.heading: 81 EXT. ROOFTOP - NIGHT 81 81
scenes.summary: Duncan kills multiple guards on a rooftop, steals a Harkonnen ornithopter, and destroys enemy transports before being pursued.

scenes.heading: 93 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - BALCONY - NIGHT 93 93
scenes.summary: Piter de Vries gloats over the captured and humiliated Thufir Hawat as Harkonnen warships dominate the conquered city.

scenes.heading: 88 INT. ORNITHOPTER (IN FLIGHT) - NIGHT 88 88
scenes.summary: The Harkonnen troopers threaten to assault Jessica while Paul uses Bene Gesserit observation techniques and commands them with the Voice.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul first successfully uses the Voice, demonstrating his emerging powers

scenes.heading: 89 EXT. DUST BASIN - NIGHT 89 89
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica escape the crashed ornithopter and discover Yueh's fremkit with survival gear and a hidden note.

scenes.heading: 91 EXT. SAND DUNES - NIGHT 91 91
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica flee across the sand dunes at night, carrying the fremkit as they watch Arrakeen burn in the distance.

scenes.heading: 94 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - DINING HALL - NIGHT 94 94
scenes.summary: Baron Harkonnen dines triumphantly while the chained and drugged Duke Leto sits at the far end of the table as violence rages outside.

scenes.heading: 95 INT. STILLTENT - DAWN (BEFORE SUNRISE) 95 95
scenes.summary: Paul inventories the fremkit contents and finds Yueh's note explaining his betrayal and revealing the Duke's ring contains poison gas.

scenes.heading: 96 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - DINING HALL - SUNRISE 96 96
scenes.summary: Duke Leto lies dead covered in white poison dust surrounded by dozens of other bodies, while the Baron's massive form clings to the ceiling.
scenes.turningPointNote: Duke Leto's death completes the fall of House Atreides and Paul's transformation into an orphaned heir

scenes.heading: EXT. STILLTENT - DAWN (BEFORE SUNRISE) 95A
scenes.summary: Windblown sand completely covers and conceals the stilltent where Paul and Jessica hide.

scenes.heading: INT. STILLTENT - SUNRISE 95B
scenes.summary: Paul experiences spice visions of possible futures while Jessica grieves, and he coldly analyzes their situation with expanding awareness.

scenes.heading: EXT. CALADAN - OPEN BAY OF WAR SPACECRAFT 95E
scenes.summary: Paul has a vision of himself as a dark leader commanding armies of Fremen from a spacecraft above Caladan.

scenes.heading: INT. STILLTENT - SUNRISE 95B
scenes.summary: Paul snaps back to reality, unable to cry for his father as spice visions shake his awareness and Jessica recoils from his cold intensity.

scenes.heading: 98 EXT. KYNES’S HOME - DAY 98 98
scenes.summary: Duncan Idaho lands at Kynes's house and urgently seeks her help as Harkonnen forces control the skies above Arrakis.

scenes.heading: 99 INT. STILLTENT - DAY 99 99
scenes.summary: Paul puts on his father's ring and detects someone approaching through the transmitter signal as he and Jessica prepare to leave the tent.

scenes.heading: 100 EXT. ARRAKIS DESERT - SUNSET 100 100
scenes.summary: A desert mouse demonstrates water collection techniques in the dunes before Paul and Jessica emerge from their sand hiding place.

scenes.heading: 101 INT. IDAHO’S ORNITHOPTER - NIGHT 101 101
scenes.summary: Duncan and Kynes rescue Paul and Jessica, providing water and rations while explaining the devastating scope of the Harkonnen victory.

scenes.heading: 102 EXT. ROCKY PROMONTORY - DAWN 102 102
scenes.summary: Fremen allies camouflage the ornithopters as Kynes leads the group into a hidden research station before an approaching sandstorm.

scenes.heading: INT. RESEARCH STATION - NEXUS - DAY 102A
scenes.summary: The group enters a huge circular chamber with stone passages leading to laboratories, lit by sunlight from above.

scenes.heading: 103 INT. LABORATORY - DAY 103 103
scenes.summary: Kynes leads Paul, Jessica, and Idaho into a laboratory facility where Fremen obey his commands, prompting Paul to ask about Kynes' relationship with the Fremen.

scenes.heading: 104 INT. LABORATORY - DAY 104 104
scenes.summary: Duncan Idaho explores a lab containing desert-adapted plants growing in sand under glass domes.

scenes.heading: 105 INT. LABORATORY OFFICE - DAY 105 105
scenes.summary: Kynes sits with Paul and Jessica in his office as Paul begins discussing what the Great Houses fear most about the Sardaukar.

scenes.heading: INT. NEXUS - DAY 105A
scenes.summary: Fifty Sardaukar soldiers drop through ceiling vents into the nexus where Fremen were drinking coffee, but the Fremen have vanished.
scenes.turningPointNote: The Imperial attack on the laboratory begins, marking the escalation of the conspiracy against House Atreides

scenes.heading: 106 INT. LABORATORY CORRIDOR - DAY 106 106
scenes.summary: Duncan Idaho sees a Fremen woman fall dead with a knife in her back as twenty Sardaukar pour through the door, and he draws his sword to face them.

scenes.heading: 107 INT. LABORATORY OFFICE / CORRIDOR - DAY 107 107
scenes.summary: Paul watches Duncan Idaho fight fifteen Sardaukar after killing five, but a Sardaukar sword pierces Idaho's chest and emerges from his back.
scenes.turningPointNote: Duncan Idaho's death - the loss of Paul's loyal protector and friend

scenes.heading: 108 INT. LABORATORY PASSAGEWAY - DAY 108 108
scenes.summary: Kynes leads Paul and Jessica through tunnels to escape, directing them to a desert-rigged thopter while she plans to report the attack to the Landsraad.

scenes.heading: INT. LABORATORY CORRIDOR - DAY 108A
scenes.summary: Duncan lies dead surrounded by nineteen fallen Sardaukar.

scenes.heading: 109 INT. CAVERN HANGAR - DAY 109 109
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica enter a cavern hangar, stow their equipment in a small ornithopter, and Paul tests the flight controls.

scenes.heading: 111 EXT. ROCKY SPIRE - DAY 111 111
scenes.summary: Kynes emerges from rocks in desert gear, observes wormsign approaching and Paul and Jessica's ornithopter taking flight.

scenes.heading: 112 INT. ORNITHOPTER - DAY 112 112
scenes.summary: Paul flies the ornithopter toward a massive sandstorm while three Harkonnen thopters pursue them and fire missiles that track their aircraft.

scenes.heading: 113 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - DAY 113 113
scenes.summary: The Baron reclines in an orange healing bath tended by terrified teenage slaves while Rabban reports that Paul and Jessica's bodies were not found.

scenes.heading: 114 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - BATH ROOM - DAY 114 114
scenes.summary: Harkonnen forces maintain complete control over the Arrakeen Residency with their dreadnought hovering overhead.

scenes.heading: 125 INT. ORNITHOPTER (IN FLIGHT) - DAY 125 125
scenes.summary: Paul flies the ornithopter at 8000 meters through dust-filled air, timing his approach to the top of the storm vortex.

scenes.heading: 126 EXT. DUST STORM - DAY 126 126
scenes.summary: The ornithopter breaks out of the storm with damaged wings and engines clogged by dust, now functioning only as a glider.

scenes.heading: 127 INT. ORNITHOPTER (IN FLIGHT) - DAY 127 127
scenes.summary: Paul sees warning lights multiply as systems fail during their descent and tells Jessica to run for the rocks when they land.

scenes.heading: 128 EXT. DESERT - DAY 128 128
scenes.summary: The ornithopter crashes in the desert, Paul and Jessica grab their gear and run toward rocks as a worm consumes the wreckage behind them.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul and Jessica are stranded in the deep desert, beginning their transformation into desert survivors

scenes.heading: EXT. ROCK RIDGE - DAY 128A
scenes.summary: Paul walks along a rock ridge followed by Jessica when they hear a voice calling out.

scenes.heading: EXT. ARRAKIS DESERT - DAY 128B
scenes.summary: Jamis, a Fremen warrior, appears to Paul in a vision and tells him he is not the One, offering to show him the ways of the desert.

scenes.heading: 129 EXT. ROCK RIDGE - DAY 129 129
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica spot greenery across four kilometers of open sand and decide to cross after dark using Fremen sandwalking techniques.

scenes.heading: 131 EXT. ROCKY RIDGE - NIGHT 131 131
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica cross the desert at night using erratic sandwalking movements, spotting distant wormsign but continuing their journey.

scenes.heading: 132 EXT. ROCKY BASIN - NIGHT 132 132
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica find themselves surrounded by an entire Fremen tribe in a rocky basin, with Stilgar recognizing Paul but Jamis challenging him to ritual combat.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul must prove himself to the Fremen through trial by combat, determining his acceptance into their society

scenes.heading: EXT. ROCKY BASIN - NIGHT 132A
scenes.summary: Stilgar gives Paul's weapon to Jamis and assigns Chani to protect the newcomers, while Jamis continues to object to their presence.

scenes.heading: EXT. ROCKY BASIN - PRE-DAWN 132B
scenes.summary: Paul prepares for ritual combat with Jamis, experiencing a vision of being stabbed, while Chani gives him her crysknife and wishes him an honorable death.

scenes.heading: 133 EXT. ROCKY RIDGELINE - DAWN 133 133
scenes.summary: The Fremen tribe travels in single file carrying Jamis's wrapped body as Paul and Jessica witness Fremen riding a sandworm, with Paul declaring 'Desert power!' in triumph.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul's successful integration with the Fremen and his first glimpse of true desert power through sandworm riding

structuralWarnings.text: All 3 key moments were auto-corrected by Phase 1C
